subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí, upon thee be My glory! The Wronged One complaineth not of tribulations, nor of that which hath befallen the favored ones in the path of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهائی ان المظلوم لایشکو من البلایا و ما ورد علی الاولیاء فی سبیل الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for martyrs
